title: taraxacum subhoplites
intro: Taraxacum subhoplites, commonly known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum subhoplites include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to support liver and kidney function, lower blood pressure, and reduce symptoms of digestive disorders. Taraxacum subhoplites can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
